case_title: BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC. VS. JAMES L. HINSON

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC.

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES L. HINSON, DBA JAMES L. HINSON, M.D. MAR-07-2013, RICHARD L. WEINER, ESQ., APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO APPEARANCE BY JAMES L. HINSON, CONTINUED TO APR-11-2013 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 FOR LETTER.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HINSON, JAMES L. D/B/A JAMES L. HINSON M.D. & JAMES L. HINSON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HINSON, JAMES L. D/B/A JAMES L. HINSON M.D. & JAMES L. HINSON $87,976.28 PRINCIPAL, $759.15 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $89,185.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HINSON, JAMES L. D/B/A JAMES L. HINSON M.D. & JAMES L. HINSON

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES L. HINSON ON APR-11-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2013 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. RICHARD L. WEINER, ESQ,. APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT CREDITOR. JAMES L. HINSON SWORN AND EXAMINED. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER EXAMINATION. (514)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC.
POS OF APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR OEX; SUBPOENA FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUN-13-2013 DISCHARGED. NO APPEARANCES.
